name: People's Republic of China — Strategic Leadership KPV Assessment (Open Source)
description: Open-source KPV assessment of PRC strategic leadership and key technical programme nodes. AO component INVERTED for adversarial org: AO = observability to allied intelligence via open-source/OSINT, NOT observability to a foreign adversary. All data from public sources: CCP public announcements, CSET/Stanford DigiChina, Carnegie, CSIS, CRS reports, state media. No classified sources.
ao_note: INVERTED AO: High AO = clearly visible to allied OSINT. Low AO = opaque to allied intelligence — indicates intelligence gap requiring attention.

roles.title: Xi Jinping — General Secretary / CMC Chairman / President
roles.notes: Personal authority over CMC, MSS, MIIT, nuclear programme. Succession architecture explicitly dismantled 2018 (term limits removed). KPCI=12; no succession mechanism identified. Source: CCP party charter (public); Xinhua public announcements; CRS R46307.

roles.title: PSC Standing Committee — Li Qiang (Premier)
roles.notes: State Council economic coordination; MIIT and industrial policy oversight. Source: State Council public org; Xinhua; CRS Chinese leadership tracker.

roles.title: CMC Joint Staff Department Director
roles.notes: PLA operational command coordination. Rocket Force oversight post-2023 restructuring. Source: IISS Military Balance; public PLA org; RAND OP-657.

roles.title: PLARF Commander (Rocket Force)
roles.notes: ICBM and conventional missile force. Post-2023 purge; succession uncertainty elevated. Source: Public PLA announcements; RAND OP-657; CRS RL33153.

roles.title: Minister, Ministry of State Security
roles.notes: MSS HUMINT, CI, and Thousand Talents Programme oversight. Source network relationships maximally tacit. KPCI elevated by AO=3.5 (publicly identified role; specific incumbent known). Source: Public MOJ/NPC records; Congressional Hearing 2023 on MSS; FBI CI reports.

roles.title: MSS — Thousand Talents Programme Operations Director
roles.notes: CRITICAL INTELLIGENCE GAP: AO=1.5 indicates this role is largely opaque to allied OSINT. Operational management of systematic KPV mapping against US/allied targets. Source: Senate PSI 2019 report (public); FBI CI public statements; DOJ prosecution records.

roles.title: Minister, Ministry of Industry and Information Technology
roles.notes: REE export restriction enforcement (April 29 2026 rules). MIIT is the processing monopoly enforcement architecture. Source: MIIT public announcements; China Daily; CSIS Critical Minerals Security Program.

roles.title: MIIT — Rare Earth Division Director
roles.notes: REE production quota allocation and enforcement. April 29 2026 administrative penalties rules. The operational node for China's primary strategic leverage. Source: MIIT REE management regulations (public); CSIS; Benchmark Mineral Intelligence.

roles.title: Director, SASTIND (Science/Tech/Industry for National Defence)
roles.notes: Defence-industrial coordination including key person protection lists for critical technical contributors (China's equivalent of NKPR). Source: SASTIND public charter; Hannas et al. 2013 Chinese Industrial Espionage; Georgetown CSET.

roles.title: Lead Separation Process Chemist — BGRIMM / Chalco
roles.notes: INTELLIGENCE GAP: AO=2.0. The individual(s) holding the specific solvent extraction chemistry knowledge for heavy REE separation at commercial scale. China has ~10-15 such individuals; they are protected under SASTIND key person protocols. Source: BGRIMM public org; Chinese academic publications; Wood Mackenzie.

roles.title: Lead Nuclear Warhead Designer — CAEP (China Academy Engineering Physics)
roles.notes: SIGNIFICANT INTELLIGENCE GAP: AO=1.5. CAEP warhead design physicists are protected under China's most restrictive key person security protocols. Source: CAEP public org (limited); NTI China nuclear programme analysis; CRS RL33153.

roles.title: AI Programme Director — MSRA / Tsinghua / National AI Lab
roles.notes: AI capability development lead — publicly identifiable through academic publications. Multiple individuals across MSRA, Tsinghua IIIS, and affiliated labs. Source: Stanford HAI AI Index; Georgetown CSET talent tracker.

roles.title: MSS APT Operations Director (Unit 61398/61486 analogue)
roles.notes: CRITICAL INTELLIGENCE GAP: AO=1.0. MSS offensive cyber operational directors are the most opaque node in PRC strategic architecture. Mandiant APT attribution is entity-level, not individual-level. Source: Mandiant APT reports; DOJ indictments (entity-level); NSA/CISA advisories.

roles.title: CATL CEO / Founder (Zeng Yuqun)
roles.notes: Corporate KPV: CATL controls 37% global EV battery market; sodium-ion/iron flow technology transition. Publicly identified; CCP political exposure. Source: CATL public filings; BloombergNEF; Reuters.
